channel.title: 8 件事 (2026/4/26)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈真热闹！我帮你筛了筛，发现 **AI Agent** 绝对是今天的“顶流”，好几个新项目都跟这个有关，而且 GitHub 上还冒出了个专门为游戏写代码的 Agent 框架。另外，关于 **Codex** 的讨论也不少，看来大家对这个 AI 编程助手又爱又恨。别急，好东西我都给你整理好了。

item.title: 8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈真热闹！我帮你筛了筛，发现 **AI Agent** 绝对是今天的“顶流”，好几个新项目都跟这个有关，而且 GitHub 上还冒出了个专门为游戏写代码的 Agent 框架。另外，关于 **Codex** 的讨论也不少，看来大家对这个 AI 编程助手又爱又恨。别急，好东西我都给你整理好了。

item.title: masterking32/MasterHttpRelayVPN
item.description: Domain-fronted HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy tunneling traffic through Google Apps Script with MITM TLS interception, HTTP/1-2 multiplexing, and DPI evasion. | 近期热门 | 总 1251 stars
item.author: masterking32

item.title: deepseek-ai/TileKernels
item.description: A kernel library written in tilelang | 近期热门 | 总 1168 stars
item.author: deepseek-ai

item.title: cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent
item.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram. | 近期热门 | 总 1140 stars
item.author: cosmicstack-labs

item.title: leigest519/OpenGame
item.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games | 近期热门 | 总 1100 stars
item.author: leigest519

item.title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
item.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only. | 近期热门 | 总 444 stars
item.author: tashfeenahmed

item.title: alash3al/stash
item.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required. | 近期热门 | 总 234 stars
item.author: alash3al

item.title: CookSleep/gpt_image_playground
item.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具 | 近期热门 | 总 162 stars
item.author: CookSleep

item.title: heider-x/vela
item.description: AI-powered IDE for novel writing — local LLM + RAG, privacy-first, BYOK. For web fiction authors and creative writers. | 近期热门 | 总 92 stars
item.author: heider-x

item.title: Mahiruxia/hermes-forge
item.description: 本地优先的 Hermes Agent 桌面工作台，集成自动部署、模型同步、Windows 桥接、微信 Gateway、文件附件、权限审批与 GitHub 自动更新。 | 近期热门 | 总 65 stars
item.author: Mahiruxia

item.title: Clawdi - 所有AI智能体的最佳家园
item.author: Clawdi
